About

I'm S. Ranjini, a computer science engineering student at Sri Jayaram Institute of Engineering & Technology, currently maintaining a CGPA of 8.1/10.

Aspiring software engineer | CSE student | Passionate about Python, web development, and technology | Always learning, building, and growing.

I am a dedicated computer science and engineering student with a passion for creating user-friendly applications and solving real-world problems through technology. I believe in continuous learning, teamwork, and building impactful software solutions that make a difference.

Mini projects

Two beginner-friendly project concepts aligned with my coursework and internships — a good next step to turn my Excel and IoT knowledge into something built.

PROJECT / 01

Student marks analyzer

An Excel-based mini project that cleans, analyzes and visualizes a class's exam scores.

  • Pivot tables to find subject-wise averages and toppers
  • Conditional formatting to flag students below passing marks
  • Charts summarizing pass rate and grade distribution
ExcelPivot tablesData analytics
Status: planned buildRepo ↗
PROJECT / 02

Smart light automation

A beginner IoT circuit that switches a light on or off automatically based on surrounding brightness.

  • LDR sensor reads ambient light levels
  • Arduino logic triggers a relay past a set threshold
  • Simple LED output to simulate the switched light
ArduinoLDR sensorIoT basics
Status: planned buildRepo ↗
